Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 31st, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: July 18th, 2006 by Warner Home Video

Running Time: 107 minutes
Plot point: Car Accident, Coming of Age, Crime, Miscellaneous Sports, Orphan, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent

Subgenre: Comedy Drama
